title: botrychium atrovirens
intro: Botrychium atrovirens, also known as the black-veined grape fern, is a type of rare and endangered plant species belonging to the family Ophioglossaceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including antiseptic and anti-inflammatory properties, which can help to reduce swelling and promote wound healing. The health benefits of Botrychium atrovirens include its potential to treat various health conditions such as arthritis, skin conditions, and respiratory issues, due to its antioxidant and antimicrobial properties. Botrychium atrovirens can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are used in folk medicine to treat various ailments.
